3301070.name: UWAR
3301070.description:
UWAR is a new, thrilling multiplayer shooter that transports players into modern combat based on real events. The game focuses on the conflict between Ukraine and Russia, giving players the chance to test themselves on the front lines. Locations like Koksohim, Irpin, and Serebryansk Forest recreate real battle zones, immersing players in dynamic operations of capturing positions, destroying ammunition depots, and fighting for strategic advantage.

UWAR offers seven unique game modes, each testing players' tactical skills and providing a varied gaming experience:

  • Conquest: Capture key points on the map to bring your team closer to victory.

  • Rush: Attack or defend objectives, using a limited reinforcement pool.

  • Kill Confirmed: Take down opponents and collect their tags to score points.

  • Team Deathmatch: A classic mode focused on kill count.

  • Capture The Flag: Steal the enemy’s flag and return it to your base.

  • Free For All: Compete for the highest score in a “every player for themselves” format.

  • Search and Destroy: Destroy objectives with only one life per round.

UWAR is more than just a game. It honors the courage and resilience of people in challenging times. By purchasing the game, you support a project that connects players to real events in modern history, making a valuable contribution to the development of the military shooter genre.
